_readme: Copy this file to memory-config.json and customize local paths. Do not commit memory-config.json.

costPolicy.note: Avoid metered APIs by default. Scheduled agent runs may still consume subscription usage limits.

enrichment._help: URL enrichment (Track A): fetch a memo's URL, extract title/representative image/summary into the structured note. Deterministic extract (trafilatura) + AI summary. Raw stays immutable; results go into an enrich block + marker JSON only.
enrichment._maxCandidatesPerRun_help: Unattended (daily) cap per run. Overflow rolls to the next day untagged (a marker with no enrichment key = still pending).
enrichment._onDemandNoticeThreshold_help: Ops-bot on-demand drains ALL pending by default; if pending exceeds this it asks first (count + subscription-usage note).
enrichment._extractsSubdir_help: 추출한 원문 전문을 <assetsFolder>/<extractsSubdir>/<markerid>.md 에 영구 보관(B). 링크가 죽어도 원문이 볼트에 남고, A2 한국어 요약의 입력으로도 쓰인다. 삭제하지 않는다.

telegram._botToken_help: Keep empty here and prefer TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var. Never commit real tokens.
telegram._allowedUserIds_help: Only messages from these Telegram numeric user IDs are saved. Empty means DENY ALL: the bot replies with the sender's numeric ID so you can add it here. Send the bot any message once to learn your ID, then paste it into this list.

agent._jobsProcessorPath_help: Single source of truth for where the AI agent that processes the Telegram job queue lives. Docs and scripts should read this value instead of hardcoding a path. ~ expands to the current user's home.

commands._help: Headless agent invocation templates for process_ai_jobs.py. {prompt} is replaced with the generated job prompt. claude/codex both support non-interactive runs.

learning._help: Learning loop (③d): captured Review decisions accumulate into rules; a signal seen promoteThreshold times (consistently) is auto-classified afterwards.
